name: Enchiladas De Pollo y Queso
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt two tablespoons of butter and cook onions and green peppers in it until softened. Remove to a bowl.
2. Stir chopped chicken and green chilis into the onion-pepper mixture.
3. Melt remaining three tablespoons of butter.
4. Blend flour and seasonings in the melted butter.
5. Whisk in chicken broth. Cook, stirring, until the sauce boils.
6. Remove from heat; stir in sour cream and half a cup of cheese.
7. Stir half a cup of sauce into the chicken mixture.
8. Dip each tortilla in the remaining hot sauce to soften and spoon the chicken mixture into the center of the tortilla.
9. Roll up and arrange in a 13 x 9 x 2 inch pan; repeat with all tortillas.
10. Pour remaining sauce over the tortillas.
11. Sprinkle with the remaining cheese.
12. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for about 25 minutes.
